owner_operator_stated: Record's phone (847) 913-5560 belongs to Dr. Irwin Mishoulam, DDS, a general dentist at 1425 McHenry Rd, Suite 211, Buffalo Grove, IL 60089 (per doctorsnetwork.com) -- a different practice than the named entity 'Kennedy & Limardi Dentistry, P.C.' Kennedy & Limardi Family Dental is a separate, verifiably real practice in the same building at Suite 101 (kldentistry.com), with phone numbers (847) 955-1500 and (847) 268-4616 found in other sources -- neither matches this record's phone.
notes: 1425 McHenry Rd is a multi-suite medical office building. The named entity (Kennedy & Limardi Dentistry, P.C.) genuinely operates there at Suite 101, but this record's specific phone number (847) 913-5560 is registered to a different tenant, Dr. Irwin Mishoulam DDS, at Suite 211. Per the successor/ownership-conflict rule, no single website can be corroborated for this exact record via the kill rule (name match alone is insufficient, and the record's own phone points to a different practice).

owner_operator_stated: Record's phone (847) 913-7700 belongs to Advanced Care in Endodontics, Ltd. notes: The vendor_website_hint 'Ace-Endo.Com' itself is the tell: fetching ace-endo.com confirms its address (1401 McHenry Rd Ste 121) and phone ((847) 913-7700) exactly match this record, but it is an endodontics-only practice owned by Dr. Robert Goldberg, unrelated to the named orthodontics entity. Two distinct dental specialty practices coexist at 1401 McHenry Rd in different suites.

Address matches record (201 E Strong St #4, Wheeling, IL 60090); site phone (847) 325-5616 differs from record's (847) 520-0740, but address corroboration alone satisfies the kill rule. Site brands as 'NextGen Dental & Orthodontics of Illinois' offering General, Orthodontics, Endodontics and Periodontics under one roof -- appears to be an independent multi-specialty practice, no DSO/group brand statement found. No careers/hiring page found on the practice's own site; third-party job board hits for 'NextGen Dental' were unrelated generic listings, not verified as sourced from this practice.

vendor_website_hint (dentalcurewheeling.com) is stale -- it 301-redirects through dentalcureil.com to the current live site dentalcureus.com/wheeling. Address matches record (75 S Milwaukee Ave, Wheeling, IL 60090); site phone 224-576-0050 differs from record's (847) 465-0800, but address corroboration is sufficient. 'Dental Cure' operates multiple locations (site states '3 Convenient Locations' across Illinois & Indiana, including Downers Grove) -- this is a small multi-location dental group/brand, not a single independent office. Third-party job boards (Glassdoor/Indeed) show a Dental Front Office Receptionist listing referencing this location, but no careers page was found on the practice's own site, so it is not counted as a verified hiring page. Dr. Obi's exact degree (DDS/DMD) was not explicitly stated on the page, only 'graduate of NYU College of Dentistry.'
